sourcePolicy: Pointed BDB type-root group leaders explicitly labeled as verbs, direct Strong's primitive roots, and Biblical-Aramaic Strong's records corresponding to those roots; published headwords are retained as lexical attestations. The hand-curated database supplies the reviewed biconsonantal and noun-base roots.

A Hebrew and English Lexicon of the Old Testament (Brown, Driver & Briggs, 1906; public domain; includes Biblical Aramaic)
